schema_note: Column schedule read top-to-bottom (หลังคา→อะเส→พื้นชั้น2→พื้นชั้น1→ตอม่อ). An up-arrow (↑) cell means 'no separate spec at this level, the bar from the level below continues through'; a plain line means the column does not exist at that level at all. Both are recorded as elements with null section/rebar plus a flag saying which of the two it is -- the distinction matters (continuous vs terminated) and is lost if the rows are simply omitted. RESTRUCTURED 2026-07-20: this file previously used a non-canonical nested `levels[]` array inside one element per mark; per primary_rawjson_schema.md §8 a multi-level schedule must instead emit one element per (element_id, level) with a flat `level` field, which is also what house #3's equivalent sheet (หน้า35) does. Also converted `section_mm: "200x200"` strings into numeric `width_mm`/`height_mm`, and renamed `tie` to `stirrup` to match the field name used everywhere else in the project.

warnings: RESTRUCTURED_2026-07-20 per primary_rawjson_schema.md §8: was 5 elements each holding a nested `levels[]` array; now 21 elements (4 marks x 5 levels, plus the standalone CN detail), one per (element_id, level) with a flat `level` field -- matching house #3's หน้า35 and the schema's own worked example. No rebar values changed. `section_mm` strings were split into numeric `width_mm`/`height_mm`, and `tie` was renamed `stirrup` for consistency with every other file in the project.

NOTE on the repeated element_id rule (สิ่งที่ต้องแก้.md item 48): that rule -- same element_id in one sheet must be ONE entry -- applies to POSITIONAL elements on a plan (footings, beams). It does NOT apply here: a multi-level schedule legitimately repeats a mark once per level, distinguished by the `level` field, exactly as schema §8 prescribes. Do not 'merge' these.

C0 is confirmed here as a short column rising only from ตอม่อ to ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 (a plain line, not an arrow, at every level above) -- consistent with the E' dummy-grid row being a partial/short-column bay, matching what was inferred from S-04's beam plan.

The distinction between an up-arrow cell (bar continues from below, no separate spec) and a plain-line cell (column absent/terminated at that level) is preserved in each element's confidence_flags. C1A terminates at หลังคา while C1 and C2 continue above it.
